pi_items.verified_value: Real dataset derived from Montgomery County MD Warehouse & Retail Sales containing exactly 30 items

pi_items.source: Mapped task description requirements to OpenXML conditional formatting rule types.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real inventory dataset containing exactly 30 items derived from Montgomery County MD Warehouse & Retail Sales. The expected conditional formatting rules in OpenXML format are 'cellIs' (for less than/greater than comparisons), 'dataBar' (for quantity bars), and 'colorScale' (for price gradient).
